title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SAP India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SAP India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? SAP India Capital India in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SAP India Capital India:
SAP India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India Capital India!
